tasks: From FIGURE_2.pdf plot results, report the measure with highest mean Percentage Change due to Multimodal Labeling. Report only the name from (Delta T, Delta Tv, Delta R, Delta I, Delta P).
From FIGURE_2.pdf plot results, report the mean Percentage Change due to Multimodal Labeling for Delta I. Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.
From FIGURE_2.pdf plot results, report whether Multimodal Labeling increases the Classifier predictive power. Report only Yes or No.
